'''gawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruffianly|ruffianly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruffianly|ruffianly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gawate|gawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gawatesher|gawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawatesherĂ«m|gawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gawatero|gawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gawateshĂ«|gawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawateshĂ«m|gawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigawatero|gokigawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigawateshĂ«|gokigawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawateshĂ«m|gokigawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogawankerom|gogawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogawankeshĂ«|gogawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawankeshĂ«m|gogawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogawankeya|gogawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gawaterom|gawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawatemu|gawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gawateya|gawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigawaterom|gokigawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawatemu|gokigawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigawateya|gokigawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gawawate|gawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gawawatesher|gawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawawatesherĂ«m|gawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gawawatero|gawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gawawateshĂ«|gawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawawateshĂ«m|gawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigawawatero|gokigawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigawawateshĂ«|gokigawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawawateshĂ«m|gokigawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogawawankerom|gogawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogawawankeshĂ«|gogawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogawawankeshĂ«m|gogawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogawawankeya|gogawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gawawaterom|gawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gawawatemu|gawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gawawateya|gawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigawawaterom|gokigawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigawawatemu|gokigawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigawawateya|gokigawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠte|gĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠtesher|gĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠtero|gĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠtero|gokigĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠterom|gĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠtemu|gĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠwĂŠteya|gĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠterom|gokigĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠwĂŠteya|gokigĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafwafte|gafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafwaftesher|gafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafwaftesherĂ«m|gafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafwaftero|gafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafwafteshĂ«|gafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafwafteshĂ«m|gafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafwaftero|gokigafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafwafteshĂ«|gokigafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafwafteshĂ«m|gokigafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafwafnkerom|gogafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafwafnkeshĂ«|gogafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafwafnkeshĂ«m|gogafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafwafnkeya|gogafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafwafterom|gafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafwaftemu|gafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafwafteya|gafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafwafterom|gokigafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafwaftemu|gokigafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafwafteya|gokigafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
